# assert distributive transformation output for Server.uvl
$clausy -i input/Server.uvl -t cnf-dist print
---

c 2 FileSystem
c 3 OperatingSystem
c 4 Logging
c 5 NTFS
c 6 APFS
c 7 EXT4
c 8 Windows
c 9 macOS
c 10 Debian
